parameters.query: SELECT id, name, slug, cuisine_type, location, ambiance, signature_dishes FROM restaurants WHERE is_active = true

SELECT cc.content_type, cc.caption, cc.hook_type, cc.format, pa.performance_score FROM post_analytics pa JOIN post_publications pp ON pa.publication_id = pp.id JOIN content_calendar cc ON pp.content_id = cc.id WHERE cc.restaurant_id = '={{ $json.restaurant_id }}' AND pa.collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '28 days' ORDER BY pa.performance_score DESC LIMIT 5

INSERT INTO content_calendar (restaurant_id, scheduled_at, platforms, content_type, format, creative_brief, hook_type, structure_type, status) VALUES ('={{ $json.restaurant_id }}', '={{ $json.scheduled_at }}', '={{ "{" + $json.platforms.join(",") + "}" }}', '={{ $json.content_type }}', '={{ $json.format }}', '={{ $json.creative_brief }}', '={{ $json.hook_type }}', '={{ $json.structure_type }}', 'planned')

INSERT INTO generation_log (restaurant_id, generation_type, model_used, input_tokens, output_tokens, created_at) VALUES ('={{ $json.restaurant_id }}', 'weekly_planning', 'claude-sonnet-4-5', 0, 0, NOW())

parameters.content:
## Planning Editorial Hebdomadaire

Génère 7 posts par restaurant chaque lundi à 6h.

**Flow:**
1. Récupère tous les restaurants actifs
2. Pour chaque restaurant (batch de 5):
   - Assemble la mémoire de marque
   - Récupère les 5 meilleurs posts
   - Obtient la météo de la semaine
   - Génère le contexte temporel
   - Construit le prompt de planning
   - Appelle Claude pour générer 7 posts
   - Parse et transforme les posts
   - Insère dans content_calendar
   - Log la génération
